title: GAIL India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: GAIL India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
